title: Travel to 3 countries every year starting 2027
description: Explore 3 new countries each year — experiencing cultures, cuisines, and adventures around the globe.

title: Drive a white Lamborghini Urus with black interior

title: Travel first class all the time
description: Make first class the standard for all my flights within the next 16 months.

description: Be there in person for at least 2 games at the FIFA World Cup.

description: Design and build a fully equipped custom home gym within the next 3 years.

title: Become 100% debt free
description: Eliminate all credit card debt and school loans completely.

description: Found and build a school dedicated to personal development and self-improvement on the African continent within 10 years.

title: Watch an NBA game courtside

description: Buy and own a quadbike for weekend adventures.

title: Reach peak physique — 18" biceps, 13% body fat
description: Achieve 18-inch biceps, 17-inch calves, 30-inch thighs, and 13% body fat maximum.

title: Stay in a treehouse in Thailand
